summary: Comprehensive testing of Agent Terrain Offline-First Sync System. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend offline-first features verified: sync bar with cache count (8 planteurs), sync timestamp, manual sync button, search with online/offline fallback, farmer details view. IndexedDB integration works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Sync download API correctly returns all farmers in zone with embedded parcels array for offline search
Sync upload API implements idempotence check using offline_id field - duplicate submissions return 'already_synced'
IndexedDB service properly creates indexes for phone_number, village, full_name for fast offline search
useOfflineAgent hook properly detects online/offline state and triggers auto-sync when coming back online
Frontend sync bar correctly displays cache count (8 planteurs) and last sync timestamp
Search fallback works: tries online API first, then falls back to IndexedDB cache on network error or offline
seed_data_creation: Created test sync_log entries during upload tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Offline-First Sync System fully functional. Key new APIs: GET /api/agent/sync/download (returns all zone farmers for IndexedDB cache), POST /api/agent/sync/upload (uploads offline queued actions with idempotence), GET /api/agent/sync/status (last sync timestamps). Frontend AgentTerrainDashboard now includes sync bar showing cache count and last sync time, manual sync button, online/offline indicator badge, and search that falls back to IndexedDB cache when offline. Sync download returns 8 farmers with embedded parcels. The 'idb' npm package (v8.0.3) is used for IndexedDB access.

features_verified.GET /api/agent/sync/download: PASS - Returns 8 farmers with parcels, sync_timestamp, data_version
features_verified.POST /api/agent/sync/upload: PASS - Accepts actions array, processes parcel_verification and ssrte_visit types, returns synced/errors count
features_verified.GET /api/agent/sync/status: PASS - Returns last_download, last_upload timestamps, total_synced_actions
features_verified.Sync data quality - farmers: PASS - All farmers have id, full_name, phone_number, parcels array
features_verified.Sync data quality - parcels: PASS - All parcels have id, area_hectares, crop_type, verification_status
features_verified.GET /api/agent/search (existing): PASS - Still works, returns Kouassi Yao Jean for 0701234567
features_verified.GET /api/agent/farmer/{id}/details (exis: PASS - Still works, returns full profile with parcels
features_verified.Frontend Online Status Badge: PASS - Shows 'En ligne' with Wifi icon
features_verified.Frontend Sync Button: PASS - Clicking 'Synchroniser' triggers sync, updates cache count
features_verified.Frontend Initial Sync Prompt: PASS - Shows 'Première synchronisation requise' when cache empty
features_verified.Frontend Search with Cache: PASS - Searching 0701234567 shows Kouassi Yao Jean with 2 parcels
features_verified.Frontend Farmer Details: PASS - Full details view shows parcels, stats cards

offline_first_architecture.sync_flow: 1. Download zone data to IndexedDB → 2. Search locally first → 3. Queue offline actions → 4. Upload on sync
offline_first_architecture.cache_persistence: Data persists in IndexedDB across browser sessions
